package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for repeated_body_rewind_for_multiple_decoders: Gin handlers that read, rewind, and decode the same request body multiple times.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule333NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule333NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule333NegativeRecord) (Rule333NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario333Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule333NegativeService, input Rule333NegativeRecord) (Rule333NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule333NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
